ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Public address of the wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wallet */,
  "wallet_type" TEXT /* Type of wallet (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum, etc.) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the wallet was created */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity on the wallet */,
  "total_balance" REAL /* Total balance in the wallet */,
  "public_key" TEXT /* Public key associated with the wallet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "kyc_status" TEXT /* KYC (Know Your Customer) status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lscp_model" (
  "lscp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LSCP assessment */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet being assessed */,
  "lscp_score" REAL /* LSCP risk score */,
  "avg_month_pay" REAL /* Average monthly payment amount */,
  "lscp_prob" REAL /* LSCP probability score */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the LSCP assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lscp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lscp_model_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "midas_model" (
  "midas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MIDAS assessment */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet being assessed */,
  "midas_max_prob" REAL /* MIDAS maximum probability score */,
  "midas_mean_prob" REAL /* MIDAS mean probability score */,
  "midas_std_dev" REAL /* MIDAS standard deviation */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the MIDAS assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("midas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_midas_model_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combined_risk" (
  "combined_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combined assessment */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet being assessed */,
  "combined_prob" REAL /* Combined probability score */,
  "payWeight" INTEGER /* Weighted average of individual risk scores */,
  "overall_risk_score" REAL /* Overall risk score for the wallet */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the combined assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combined_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combined_risk_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, etc.) */,
  "recipient_address" TEXT /* Recipient address (if applicable) */,
  "sender_address" TEXT /* Sender address (if applicable) */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score at the time of assessment */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model used (e.g., LSCP, MIDAS, etc.) */,
  "assessment_result" TEXT /* Result of the risk assessment (e.g., high, low, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_logs_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high risk, suspicious activity, etc.) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
